title: Sofia Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Sofia as she counts from 1 to 5, discovering happy things that make her smile and feel joy.

pages.text: Sofia feels happy! She wants to count happy things.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes smiling widely with arms outstretched, surrounded by colorful number shapes floating around her

pages.text: ONE bright yellow sun makes Sofia smile.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes pointing up at one large yellow sun with a smiling face, the number 1 prominently displayed in bright colors

pages.text: TWO red balloons make Sofia giggle.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes holding two bright red balloons, laughing joyfully with the number 2 decorated with balloon patterns

pages.text: THREE colorful flowers make Sofia dance.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes dancing next to three beautiful flowers in pink, purple, and yellow, with the number 3 made of flower petals
illustration.alt: Sofia counting three flowers while dancing

pages.text: FOUR singing birds make Sofia clap.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes clapping her hands while four colorful birds perch nearby with musical notes, the number 4 decorated with feather patterns

pages.text: FIVE sweet cookies make Sofia very happy! Count with Sofia!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sitting at a table with five round chocolate chip cookies arranged in a neat row, the number 5 made of cookie crumbs, Sofia looking delighted

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many suns did Sofia count?
questions.explanation: Sofia counted ONE bright yellow sun that made her smile.

questions.question: What made Sofia dance?
questions.explanation: The three colorful flowers made Sofia dance with joy.

questions.question: How many cookies did Sofia count?
questions.explanation: Sofia counted five sweet cookies that made her very happy.
